item.victus.broken_heart.description: Returns all consumed hearts when eaten.
item.victus.void_heart_aspect.descriptio: Removes your rightmost heart when eaten.
item.victus.creeper_heart_aspect.descrip: Creates an explosion when broken, without harming yourself.
item.victus.diamond_heart_aspect.descrip: Provides 2 Armor and 0.5 Armor Toughness while active.
item.victus.grilled_heart_aspect.descrip: Directly restores hunger and saturation when broken.
item.victus.light_heart_aspect.descripti: Completely negates fall damage when broken.
item.victus.ocean_heart_aspect.descripti: Consumes charge while in water to grant Dolphin's Grace and Conduit Power (which includes Water Breathing).
item.victus.totem_heart_aspect.descripti: Consumes a Totem of Undying from your inventory when broken to prevent death and heal 15 health; otherwise heals 5 health.
item.victus.potion_heart_aspect.descript: Stores a potion effect when drinking, and releases it when broken.
item.victus.archery_heart_aspect.descrip: Shoots 5 Harming II tipped arrows with knockback when broken.
item.victus.blazing_heart_aspect.descrip: Sets nearby enemies on fire when broken.
item.victus.draconic_heart_aspect.descri: Spawns a safe dragon breath cloud when broken.
item.victus.emerald_heart_aspect.descrip: Reduces the total recharge duration of all consumed hearts by 25% when broken.
item.victus.evoking_heart_aspect.descrip: Summons 3 tamed Vexes with swords when broken.
item.victus.icy_heart_aspect.description: Grants Slowness to surrounding enemies when broken.
item.victus.iron_heart_aspect.descriptio: Summons a protecting Iron Golem when broken.
item.victus.lapis_heart_aspect.descripti: Consumes experience orbs to restore health when active.
item.victus.sweet_heart_aspect.descripti: Grants Speed and Haste when broken.
item.victus.cheese_heart_aspect.descript: Clears all negative potion effects when broken.
item.minecraft.splash_potion.effect.blee: Splash Potion of the Bleeding Heart
item.minecraft.lingering_potion.effect.b: Lingering Potion of the Bleeding Heart
message.victus.potion_aspect_limit: You already have a Potion Heart!
